content:
## MARKET OVERVIEW

**1. What is the Current Market Regime?**
NEUTRAL regime — normal volatility 25.7% with very narrow participation (breadth 1/8), signaling rangebound market with idiosyncratic moves.

**2. Which sectors are leading?**
Construction & REIT leading: TKFEN (1W: +4.04% | 1M: +0.64%) ABOVE TREND, ALARK (1W: +1.54% | 1M: +9.53%) ABOVE TREND.

**3. Which sectors are lagging?**
Technology & Telecom, Energy & Chemicals and Banking & Finance are lagging — KONTR (1W: -36.28% | 1M: -55.03%) BELOW TREND, HEKTS (1W: -18.03% | 1M: -14.75%) BELOW TREND, AKBNK (1W: -5.62% | 1M: +20.70%) CORRECTION.

## STOCK PERFORMANCE

**4. Top Performing Stocks?**
VESTL (1W: +7.16% | 1M: -1.21%) RECOVERY; EREGL (1W: +5.25% | 1M: +8.97%) ABOVE TREND; TKFEN (1W: +4.04% | 1M: +0.64%) ABOVE TREND; ALARK (1W: +1.54% | 1M: +9.53%) ABOVE TREND; KCHOL (1W: +1.48% | 1M: +4.81%) ABOVE TREND.

**5. Worst Performing Stocks?**
KONTR (1W: -36.28% | 1M: -55.03%) BELOW TREND; HEKTS (1W: -18.03% | 1M: -14.75%) BELOW TREND; ASELS (1W: -10.19% | 1M: -4.93%) BELOW TREND; TRALT (1W: -8.37% | 1M: +7.85%) CORRECTION; SASA (1W: -7.69% | 1M: -4.55%) BELOW TREND.

**6. Momentum Stocks?**
KONTR (1W: -36.28% | 1M: -55.03%) BELOW TREND; HEKTS (1W: -18.03% | 1M: -14.75%) BELOW TREND; ASELS (1W: -10.19% | 1M: -4.93%) BELOW TREND; VESTL (1W: +7.16% | 1M: -1.21%) RECOVERY; EREGL (1W: +5.25% | 1M: +8.97%) ABOVE TREND; TKFEN (1W: +4.04% | 1M: +0.64%) ABOVE TREND.

## SECTOR OUTLOOK

**7. Banking Sector Outlook?**
Banks showing profit-taking after big 1M gains: AKBNK (1W: -5.62% | 1M: +20.70%) CORRECTION, YKBNK (1W: -6.27% | 1M: +22.62%) CORRECTION, GARAN (1W: -3.69% | 1M: +12.61%) CORRECTION — wait for stabilization before adding.

**8. Industrial Sector Outlook?**
Heavy industry mixed: EREGL (1W: +5.25% | 1M: +8.97%) ABOVE TREND, VESTL (1W: +7.16% | 1M: -1.21%) RECOVERY, ASELS (1W: -10.19% | 1M: -4.93%) BELOW TREND — prefer quality names with earnings visibility.

**9. Energy & Chemicals Outlook?**
Energy remains weak and commodity-sensitive: TUPRS (1W: -3.39% | 1M: -7.20%) BELOW TREND, SASA (1W: -7.69% | 1M: -4.55%) BELOW TREND, HEKTS (1W: -18.03% | 1M: -14.75%) BELOW TREND — avoid momentum buys here.

## PORTFOLIO STRATEGY

**10. Portfolio Recommendation?**
Neutral tactical stance: trim bank/tech exposure after sharp 1W drops, add selective heavy-industry and construction winners (EREGL, TKFEN) and keep cash for event-driven opportunities.

## NEXT WEEK OUTLOOK

**11. Stocks to Watch Next Week?**
EREGL (1W: +5.25% | 1M: +8.97%) ABOVE TREND for momentum continuation; AKBNK (1W: -5.62% | 1M: +20.70%) CORRECTION for mean-reversion or follow-through selling; KONTR (1W: -36.28% | 1M: -55.03%) BELOW TREND for volatility; THYAO (1W: +1.22% | 1M: +11.46%) ABOVE TREND for seasonal flow.

**12. Sectors to Watch Next Week?**
Banking & Finance for post-run consolidation, Technology & Telecom for downside risk, Heavy Industry/Construction for selective leadership.

**13. Key Levels & Triggers?**
Watch XU100 short-term range and intraday support/resistance (monitor breaks of recent swing lows/highs); catalysts: CBRT commentary, TL moves, global risk sentiment, commodity prices and corporate earnings/flows.

## EXECUTIVE SUMMARY
NEUTRAL market: normal volatility (25.7%) but very narrow breadth (1/8 sectors positive), so leadership is idiosyncratic. Trade selective strength in construction and heavy industry, trim exposure to banks and tech until participation broadens; key risk is renewed selling in high-vol names (KONTR, HEKTS).
